mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN ACTIVE_STATUS ='Y' THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Inactive' END AS ACTION ,NM_TYPE AS TYPE ,CASE WHEN INDV_CORP_CCD =2 THEN ENTITY_NM ELSE NVL(FIRST_NM, '') ||' '|| NVL(MIDDLE_NM, '') ||' '|| NVL(SUR_NM, '') END AS CS_NM ,FIRST_NM AS CS_NM_FIRST ,MIDDLE_NM AS CS_NM_MIDDLE ,SUR_NM AS CS_NM_LAST ,FAC_REG_DT AS REG_DT FROM WAL_NM WHERE DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT A.DJ_UID ,A.PLACE_OF_BIRTH AS BIRTHPLACE ,B.ADDR_LINE ,B.ADDR_CITY AS RESIDENCE ,B.ADDR_COUNTRY AS NATIONALITY ,C.EU_DATE_FORM AS BIRTHDATE ,D.PLACE_NM ,PROFILE AS FURTHER_INFORMATION1 FROM WAL_BAS A LEFT OUTER JOIN WAL_ADDR B ON (A.DJ_UID = B.DJ_UID) LEFT OUTER JOIN WAL_DT C ON (A.DJ_UID = C.DJ_UID) LEFT OUTER JOIN WAL_POB D ON (A.DJ_UID = D.DJ_UID) WHERE A.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} AND C.DATE_TYPE = 'Date of Birth'

SELECT CASE WHEN A.ACTIVE_STATUS ='Y' THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Inactive' END AS ACTION ,A.ROLE_TYPE AS TYPE ,A.OCC_TITLE AS JOB_NM ,A.FAC_REG_DT AS REG_DT FROM WAL_ROLE A WHERE 1 = 1 AND M.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID}

SELECT A.ASSOCIATE_ID AS FAM_UID ,(SELECT X.CNTNT_NM FROM WAL_CD_BODY X WHERE X.CNTNT = A.ASSOCIATE_CD AND X.CD = 'W003') AS TYPE ,A.FAC_REG_DT AS REG_DT ,A.CS_NM AS FAM_NM FROM WAL_RELATION A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT MAX(SQ) AS SQ ,MAX(CS_NM) AS CS_NM ,WC_UID FROM NIC19B_FACTIVA GROUP BY WC_UID) B ON (B.WC_UID = A.ASSOCIATE_ID) WHERE A.DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} ORDER BY A.SEQ

SELECT DISTINCT B.CD_NM AS CATEGORY ,'WPEP01' AS WC_LIST_CCD_NM ,A.WC_UID AS WC_UID FROM NIC19B_FACTIVA A INNER JOIN NIC92B B ON ( B.CD = 'A003' AND B.CNTNT = A.WC_LIST_CCD ) WHERE A.WC_UID = #{WC_UID}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY DATE_TYPE, SEQ) AS FIELD_SEQ ,DATE_TYPE AS FIELD_DESC ,EU_DATE_FORM AS FIELD_VALUE FROM WAL_DT WHERE DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} AND DATE_TYPE NOT IN ('Date of Birth') ORDER BY DATE_TYPE ,SEQ

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NTN_TYPE, SEQ) AS FIELD_SEQ ,NTN_TYPE AS FIELD_DESC ,NTN_CODE AS FIELD_VALUE FROM WAL_NATION WHERE DJ_UID = #{WC_UID} AND NTN_TYPE NOT IN ('Citizenship', 'Resident of', 'BirthPlace') ORDER BY NTN_TYPE ,SEQ
